text: Hello. Hello. Hello. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Evelyn. So I'm calling because they're appending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Wisconsin State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? [inaudible]
